task.title: Fix DM routing filter in wrap.rs — allow thread replies, presence events, and conversation_id targets

events.content: Widen DM filter rather than restructure — add pass-through for empty targets (presence), 'thread' synthetic targets, dm_/conv_ prefixed conversation IDs.
